videoSnippet.title: Patzer Sees a Check... || Keres vs Fischer || Curaçao Candidates Tournament 1962

Paul Keres vs Bobby Fischer
"The Heat of Battle" (game of the day Dec-08-2024)
Curacao Candidates (1962), Willemstad AHO, rd 14, May-24
Sicilian Defense: Chameleon (B20) 

1. e4 c5 2. Ne2 d6 3. g3 g6 4. Bg2 Bg7 5. O-O Nc6 6. c3 e5 7. d3 Nge7 8. a3 O-O 9. b4 b6 10. f4 ef4 11. gf4 d5 12. e5 Bg4 13. h3 Be2 14. Qe2 f6 15. b5 Na5 16. Nd2 fe5 17. fe5 Rf1 18. Nf1 Nb3 19. Rb1 Nc1 20. Rc1 Qc7 21. Re1 Rd8 22. Nh2 d4 23. cd4 cd4 24. Nf3 Bh6 25. Qa2 Kh8 26. Qe6 Nd5 27. Nh2 Ne3 28. Bc6 Rf8 29. Nf3 Bf4 30. Nd4 Be5 31. Nf3 Bd4 32. Re3 Be3 33. Qe3 Qg3 34. Kf1 Qh3 35. Ke1 Qf5 36. d4 Kg7 37. Kf2 h5 38. Kg3 Qg4 39. Kh2 Rf4 40. Qe7 Kh6 41. Qe2 Qf5 42. Qe3 g5 43. Kg2 Rg4 44. Kf2 Rf4 45. Kg2 Qc2 46. Kh1 Qb1 47. Kh2 Qa2 48. Kh3 Qf7 49. Kh2 Qf6 50. Kg2 Kg7 51. Kg3 h4 52. Kg2 Rg4 53. Kh1 Rg3 54. Qe4 g4 55. Nh2 Qg5 56. Nf1 Rh3 57. Kg1 Ra3 58. d5 g3 59. Bd7 Ra1 60. Bf5 Qf6 61. Qf4 Re1 62. d6 Re5 63. Qg4 Kf8 64. d7 Rd5 65. Kg2 Rd7 66. Bd7 Qf2 67. Kh3 Qf1 68. Kh4 g2 69. Qb4 Kf7 70. Qb3 Kg7 71. Qg3 Kh7 72. Qe5 Qh1 73. Bh3 Qh3 74. Kh3 g1Q 75. Qe7 Kh8 76. Qf8 Kh7 77. Qf7
